description: Compares the most recent stored inspection outcomes for registered passenger cars split into three age bands: under 3 years, 3–8 years, and over 8 years. Uses live inspection outcome labels. Not a first-inspection history — reflects the latest stored inspection result per car.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsResultat.keyword IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1900 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= DATE_EXTRACT("year", NOW()) | EVAL age = DATE_EXTRACT("year", NOW()) - _foerste_registrering_aar, age_band = CASE(age < 3, "Under 3 years", age <= 8, "3-8 years", "Over 8 years"), result = SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsResultat.keyword | STATS total = COUNT(*), approved = COUNT(*) WHERE result == "Godkendt", conditional = COUNT(*) WHERE result == "KanGodkendesVedOmsynAfOmsynsvirksomhed" OR result == "KanGodkendesVedOmsynAfSynsvirksomhed", not_approved = COUNT(*) WHERE result == "IkkeGodkendt" OR result == "IkkeGodkendtKanGenfremstilles" BY age_band | EVAL approved_pct = ROUND(approved * 100.0 / total, 1), conditional_pct = ROUND(conditional * 100.0 / total, 1), not_approved_pct = ROUND(not_approved * 100.0 / total, 1) | SORT age_band ASC | LIMIT 10
